cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out where Eve ends up. So, there are five players: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each starts in a specific position. First, let's list their starting positions: - Alice: fullback - Bob: center midfielder - Claire: right midfielder - Dave: left winger - Eve: goalkeeper Now, there are several swaps. Let me go through each one step by step. 1. Dave and Eve trade positions. So after this swap: - Dave becomes goalkeeper (since Eve was there) - Eve becomes left winger (since Dave was there) 2. Claire and Bob trade positions. So now: - Claire becomes center midfielder (Bob's original position) - Bob becomes right midfielder (Claire's original position) 3. Alice and Bob trade positions. So: - Alice becomes right midfielder (since Bob was there) - Bob becomes fullback (Alice's original position) Wait, hold on. After step 2, Bob was in right midfielder. So when Alice and Bob swap, Alice takes Bob's current position (right midfielder) and Bob takes Alice's original position (fullback). Right. 4. Eve and Dave trade positions again. But wait, after the first swap, they traded once, and now they're trading back? Let me check. Initially, Dave
